Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft'S Answers To Pltf'S Special Interrogatories, Set One, Questions 42 Through 52 And Deft'S Verifications To Pltf'S Discovery; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft Irene Lin And Her Attorney Scott Stratman; Exhibits
Off Calendar Jul-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Francisco Saldana's Motion to Compel Answers to Special Interrogatories [Set One, #42-52] granted. All objections waived except for attorney-client privilege and attorney work product privilege. Full, verified responses shall be served within 10 days of this Order. Commissioner: PAUL SLAVIT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
